created.subject: Sprioc socraithe: {{title}} — {{community}}
created.title: Sprioc Cruthaithe!
created.body: Shocraigh tú sprioc nua ar {{community}}. Coinnigh ort — seolfaimid meabhrúcháin chugat chun cabhrú leat fanacht ar an mbóthar ceart.

completed.subject: Sprioc bainte amach: {{title}} — {{community}}
completed.title: Sprioc Bainte Amach!
completed.body: Obair iontach! Chríochnaigh tú do sprioc ar {{community}}. Tá do rannchuidiú leis an bpobal ríluachmhar.

abandoned.subject: Sprioc bainte: {{title}} — {{community}}
abandoned.title: Sprioc Bainte
abandoned.note: Is féidir leat sprioc nua a shocrú am ar bith ó do phróifíl.

goal_milestone.progress_subject: Tá tú {{percent}}% den bhealach chuig do sprioc!
goal_milestone.progress_body: Shroich tú {{percent}}% de do sprioc '{{goal}}'. Tá dul chun cinn iontach á dhéanamh agat — coinnigh ort!
goal_milestone.complete_body: Chríochnaigh tú do sprioc '{{goal}}' go rathúil. Is éacht iontach é seo — maith thú!
